name: deadlands-character-creator-and-tracker
description: Unofficial local-first Deadlands/SWADE character creator and table tracker.

scripts.test:quick: npm run test:static && npm run test:browser:fast
scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:browser
scripts.format: prettier --write README.md NOTICE.md PRIVACY.md docs/case-study.md docs/character-setup-contract.md docs/advancement-contract.md package.json playwright.config.cjs "tests/**/*.{js,cjs}" src/persistence.js src/app-ui.js
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md NOTICE.md PRIVACY.md docs/case-study.md docs/character-setup-contract.md docs/advancement-contract.md package.json playwright.config.cjs "tests/**/*.{js,cjs}" src/persistence.js src/app-ui.js
